timed_boundary: HipKittens route-keyed 64-row D512 row-term producer gate. QK and dO*V^T are accumulated over four D128 chunks before LSE/softmax_dot row terms, then P/dP feed one D128 dK/dV scratch epilogue. This is not full SparseAttnSharedkvGrad: it does not emit full-D dQ, dOriKV, dCmpKV, or dSinks.

pre_fix_diagnostic.root_cause: D512 loop passed element offset d_start as HipKittens tile coordinate; unit_coord multiplied it by ST::cols, causing out-of-bounds source column reads for chunks > 0.

read.compile_read: The full-D row-term producer compiles with no spills but is resource-heavy at 256 VGPRs, 256 AGPRs, and one wave per SIMD.
read.runtime_read: After replacing D512 source-load column coordinates from element offsets to tile coordinates, active_tiles=64 is finite with production-sized S4096 source tensors and no source padding. Median latency is 0.04756 ms for this limited gate.
read.next_action: Extend the same corrected coordinate contract toward the full SharedKV boundary: full-D dQ, dOriKV, route-aware dCmpKV, and true dSinks. Do not compare this tiny 16-query-row scratch epilogue gate directly to the Triton 11.02 ms C4 source-boundary baseline.
